name: Compilation failure: missing semicolon in ExpenseService.java blocks all functional tests
description:
The main application fails to compile due to a missing semicolon on the field declaration at ExpenseService.java line 25. This prevents both ExpenseControllerFunctionalTest and ExpenseControllerActualDataFunctionalTest from executing.

Error: ';' expected at /src/main/java/com/example/expensetracker/service/ExpenseService.java:[25,54]

Affected line:
  private final ExpenseRepository expenseRepository  // <-- missing semicolon

Impact: 100% of functional tests cannot run. Zero test cases executed.
logs:

[INFO] 1 error
